note: create-1k: octane must not fall to >2x React's create time (known ~0.8-1.0x; generous headroom).
swap rows: LIS keyed reconcile vs React (known <1x).

rotate-backward is the LIS-vs-lastPlacedIndex differentiator: octane moves 1 node, React moves all survivors (known ~12x faster → 0.08x). Guard 0.6 leaves huge headroom while still catching a fast-path break.
1000 memo(Row) mount: octane compiles the wall (known ~0.12x React).
parent re-render absorbed by 1000 shallow-equal bails: structural octane win (known ~0.11x). If octane stops bailing this shoots past 1.
full per-cell update churn: octane's per-binding diff vs React (known <1x).
octane server render() vs react-dom renderToString at 50 cards (known ~0.6x → octane faster). Guard 1.2 tolerates noise but catches an octane SSR regression.
intra-octane de-opt cliff: plain-.ts createElement vs compiled .tsrx SSR (known ~2.1x). Bounds the cliff so a broken fast path (ratio→1) or a runaway deopt (ratio>4) both surface.
shipped gzip bytes vs ripple, same app, normalized minify (measured 2.09x on record 2026-07-08). RATCHET DOWN as the compiled-output plan phases land (docs/compiled-output-optimization-plan.md).
shipped gzip bytes vs solid, same app, normalized minify (measured 1.80x on record 2026-07-08). Ratchet down with the compiled-output plan.
gzip(minified compiled corpus) vs gzip(source corpus). Phase 1 (bag factories) + 3c (prod Symbol() hook slots) landed 2026-07-08: 1.19x -> 1.07x measured; ceiling ratcheted to 1.12.
APP-CODE-ONLY gzip vs ripple, same app, normalized minify. Phases 1+3c measured 1.35x (was 1.43x); ceiling ratcheted to 1.40. Primary ratchet for docs/compiled-output-optimization-plan.md.
APP-CODE-ONLY gzip vs solid, same app, normalized minify. Phases 1+3c measured 1.56x (was 1.66x); ceiling ratcheted to 1.65.

10-level nested-use() init waterfall vs React 19 (measured 0.57x on record 2026-07-08 - React's suspense retry scheduling nearly doubles its own floor). Octane must stay at-or-under React. NO guard vs solid/ripple: they are parallel by model (~1x floor vs ~11x) until compiler-parallelized use lands (docs/suspense-parallel-use-plan.md) - add those guards WITH that feature.
transition-driven refetch waterfall vs React 19 (measured 0.99x on record 2026-07-08).
